findings.title: Unsafe Deserialization of Job Import via node-serialize
findings.description: User-supplied payload passed directly to node-serialize deserialize() enabling arbitrary code execution via IIFE pattern

findings.title: Unsafe Deserialization in Data Store Retrieval
findings.description: Data store retrieval passes stored serialized data to node-serialize deserialize() which can execute embedded functions

findings.title: Arbitrary Module Loading via require()
findings.description: Plugin install endpoint calls require() with user-supplied path enabling arbitrary module loading and code execution

findings.title: VM Context Escape via Template Rendering
findings.description: Template rendering uses vm.runInContext() which is not a true sandbox and allows prototype chain traversal to escape the context

findings.title: Remote Code Execution via Hook Registration
findings.description: Hook registration fetches JavaScript from user-supplied URL and executes it in a VM context with require access
